Rules Overview

This page documents the Snakemake rules that define the radiomic feature extraction workflow. Rules are grouped by processing stage.

  • HSF Segmentation Rule (Step 1)
  • Data Processing Rules (Step 2)
  • Mesh Generation Rules (Step 3)
  • Feature Extraction and Aggregation Rules (Steps 4–6)

API

  • run_utils functions
    • aggregate
      • run_aggregation()
    • batchExecutor
      • run_snakemake_batch()
    • cleanup
      • cleanup_intermediate_files()
      • cleanup_with_confirmation()
    • config
    • logger
      • tail_log_file()
    • progress
      • parse_progress()
      • print_progress_bar()
    • subjects
      • discover_subjects()
  • data_analysis scripts
    • aggregate_data
      • aggregate_region_data()
      • append_csv()
      • form_row_from_data()
    • feature_extraction
      • calculate_curv_metrics()
      • extract_curvatures()
      • extract_pyradiomics_features()
    • hsf_wrapper
      • run_hsf_segmentation()
    • nii_parse
      • binarify_hd_mask()
      • combine_labels()
      • split_one_label()
    • voxelToMesh
      • nii_to_vtk()
